mapper.select: SELECT * FROM driver_violation_view ORDER BY violation_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO violation_record (driver_id, vehicle_id, line_id, station_id, violation_type_id, violation_time, description, inputter_id) VALUES (#{driverId}, #{vehicleId}, #{lineId}, #{stationId}, #{violationTypeId}, #{violationTime}, #{description}, #{inputterId})
